next_cycle_focus: Keep only the mechanisms that prove density on their best-fit lane. If SOL range-failure reacceptance and ETH deep reset both trade credibly, refine exits before touching entry grammar. rationale: Cycle 71 is a SOL-centered explore reset after cycle 70 produced one clear bad idea and two 0-trade sparse failures. The live authority explicitly wants three mechanisms: range-failure reversal after lost acceptance, trend reset continuation after deeper pullback, and compression fakeout into re-expansion. This batch assigns each mechanism to the lane where it is most plausible rather than forcing everything onto SOL: SOL 4h carries the range-failure reacceptance thesis in the primary chop lane, ETH 4h is the cleanest fit for a deeper reset continuation that is materially different from dead shallow pullback logic, and TAO 4h remains the only lane where fakeout-to-reexpansion plausibly has room to run. The batch stays strictly inside the supported/fetchable universe, uses justified multi-lane baskets, varies indicator-role assignment and management structure, and avoids the event-sparse grammar that just failed.
